subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from the Wronged One unto those who have turned their faces toward the Most Exalted Horizon and have drunk of the Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی الذین توجهوا الی الافق الاعلی و شربوا کوثر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
